Date: Tue, 20 May 2025 13:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-05-20
Message-ID: <V1k45JBZS7SgAQQTM3n6mw@geopod-ismtpd-30>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="4c4cd429b403a88887473a59f45fd920f0fe2dd3d2614247015d07ab74ff"

Hi there, Loyal Llama Listeners! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter!
We're thrilled to share some exciting updates, including our new
Memory API, enhancements to LlamaParse, and the introduction of
Tig, a terminal-based AI coding agent.

In-Person Workshop in NYC: Join LlamaIndex CEO Jerry Liu for a
workshop on AI in finance, featuring top thinkers and builders.
Limited spots available, register here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.1mFU7qxpDSBDZVAKOJIIrtdxtz9-7d2IqkfmYSAXX_M ).

Office hours on Discord: You can also join us on Thursday, May
22nd at 8am Pacific/5pm CET for an events driven agent workflows
run-through and live coding session. Join the event on Discord 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._ZXZlbnQ9MTM3MjY1NDUyNzg2MTQ5MzgwMCZfX3M9ODF3eGNwcjZlZmgzNXI0ZmoxNmEifQ.SAF9lWF0OhXZ50_kf1Xp6xeOgISNvjMoqLSCNeJjKRs ) to get
notified when it starts!

🤩 The Highlights:

* Big Memory Upgrade in LlamaIndex: Our new flexible Memory API
combines short-term chat history and long-term memory with
plug-and-play blocks, including StaticMemoryBlock,
FactExtractionMemoryBlock, and VectorMemoryBlock. Learn more in
our docs ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..FdNkuZy3qN6CE44X5-emajXh1jwNfJ7JLa1xTm62oPk ).

* Exciting Updates to LlamaParse: We’ve streamlined the interface
for a faster user experience, added a Code Snippet button for
easy configuration copying, and introduced new presets for
various use cases. Get started with LlamaCloud here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ADNu-wncmqvBfKSMCfFZ_HcnWFMkR8LPVf1H4B_ahtQ ).

* Citations and Reasoning in LlamaExtract: Discover how to
implement citations and reasoning in your LlamaExtract agents
with our latest code walkthrough. Watch the full video here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..9fWrqdkbObiGPHYtKSw2nOfG16ZaSorUkFBgfFYaS2c ).

✍️ Community:

* Introducing Tig, the Terminal-Based AI Coding Agent: Built with
LlamaIndex workflows, Tig can write, debug, and analyze code
across multiple languages. Check out Tig on GitHub 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..T0DeqZlFAXppPiAb21jwm77131faqDo3SYosIdlPqvE ) and learn how to create your own
agentic applications with Workflows here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..fB4OzWK80wduA-4EiTta2dOMTVocpm34WwF88Rlv2QA ).

* Event-Driven Agent Workflows Walkthrough: Learn how to build a
multi-agent Docs Assistant that writes web pages and uses
orchestrators for search and aggregation. Check out the full code
and guide here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..OcakikrOKaAGY6ji9M0OCyijUOTNAHuPqwBtoKFn-Vk ).

* Memory Component for AI Agents: Improve your agents' memory
with our new Memory component, allowing for context-aware
conversations and long-term recall. Read the intro blog here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..qxbIZ_tKBjMO3AS83UZN3JPb6bZFSEbxKzj4Te4Sw0c ).

Thank you for being part of the LlamaIndex community! We can’t
wait to see what you build with these new features. Stay tuned
for more updates, and as always, feel free to reach out with any
questions or feedback.

Happy coding! 🚀

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..DlKPV-6wA3tFhicZO_AM4VNcv2oNBmezzlw0JEG0ptk )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..WTiztMXcMuQ6_Xu-h-45z6auY3aXd_fdJWfIFCu3XF0 )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..EDavnjjqVRL9KLVg7Bu53iT9McyqNyH_OX-fiC1Mhug )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
